form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Latest effort finished 4th on April 14 over 460m at this track behind Reuben Hill beaten 6 lengths (26.41) in a Grade 5. Has run a slick time here with a 25.93 PB at the distance. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Drawn the inside. Latest effort finished 4th on April 14 over 460m at this track behind Reuben Hill beaten 6 lengths (26.41) in a Grade 5. Has run a slick time here with a 25.93 PB at the distance. Worth including.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Sale over 435m. Last start finished 4th over 515m at Sandown beaten 5.5 lengths (29.93) behind He's Magic in a Grade 5 on April 9. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Strong performance leading throughout to score by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at Ballarat, clocking a brilliant 25.08 for the 450m trip. Hard to top on that run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance leading throughout to score by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at Ballarat, clocking a brilliant 25.08 for the 450m trip. Hard to top on that run.

form.formComment: Caught the eye with a fast early split last time and setting up a neck win at Healesville over 350m in 19.49, making it two wins on end. Can bring up a hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Caught the eye with a fast early split last time and setting up a neck win at Healesville over 350m in 19.49, making it two wins on end. Can bring up a hat-trick.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (23.05) over 400m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (23.05) over 400m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Recorded a 5.5 lengths win (22.84) in a Grade 5 last time at this track. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Has been racing well and scored a good win last start at Healesville on April 12 over 350m in 19.40. In winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a sizzling early split and led throughout to score when a 4.5 lengths winner (24.12) at Sale. In top form and can make it three straight.
